_comment: SIMULATED DATA — Transit schedules for MetLife Stadium (East Rutherford, NJ). Modeled after realistic NJ Transit / shuttle patterns for a World Cup event. In production, replace with a live transit API adapter.

options.name: NJ Transit — Meadowlands Rail
options.description: Direct rail service from Penn Station (NY) and Secaucus Junction to Meadowlands Station, 5-min walk to Gate A.
options.accessibilityNotes: All trains are wheelchair accessible. Priority seating available.

options.name: Official FIFA Shuttle — North Hub
options.description: Free official shuttle from North Transit Hub to Times Square (NYC) and Lincoln Tunnel park-and-ride.
options.accessibilityNotes: Wheelchair-accessible vehicles available. Request at the hub.

options.name: Accessible Shuttle — West Hub
options.description: Priority accessible shuttle service from West Hub. Serves nearby hotels and accessible parking areas.
options.accessibilityNotes: All vehicles are fully accessible. No pre-booking required.

options.name: NJ Transit Bus — South Hub
options.description: NJ Transit express bus service from South Hub to multiple New Jersey destinations.

options.name: Rideshare Pickup — East
options.description: Designated Uber/Lyft pickup zone in East Parking area.
options.accessibilityNotes: Select 'Wheelchair Accessible' in app for adapted vehicles.
